author: 琴葉姉妹の放課後
text:
笑うなって言われると絶対笑うやつ #shorts
『笑うなって言われると絶対笑うやつ』についてボイスロイドがお話します！

I sincerely honor and respect the creator of the original content.
This video is a transformative work produced for entertainment and commentary in accordance with the principles of Fair Use under U.S. Copyright Law, Section 107.
All original sources are fully credited within the video.
I have added my own narration, included subtitles, and edited the footage—such as trimming and rearranging scenes—to highlight key moments.
I fully understand and accept that the final decision regarding copyright and monetization rests with YouTube and the original rights holders.

#VOICEROID解説 #VOICEROID #琴葉姉妹 #紲星あかり #ショート
